directive_processed.title: Author PROP for structural fix to agent state-coupling bug family (4 observed instances over 6 days)

findings.description: PROP-014 authored per DIRECTIVE-20260502-001. Three-mechanism structural fix proposed for the agent state-coupling bug family: Mechanism 2 (verify-on-read for daily-report critical declarations), Mechanism 1a (push-verify on decider closed-issues + tracker), Mechanism 1b (file-write-verify on analyst Mode 5 + extension to other analyst modes), Mechanism 3 (narrative-cite discipline across all agent prose surfaces). Sequential rollout recommended for diagnostic value. New shared reference doc proposed at monitor/prompts/reference/state-verification.md and new verifier helper at monitor/scripts/verify-pending-state.js. Operator approves and authorizes implementation in a separate step.
findings.evidence: monitor/tinker/proposals/PROP-014-agent-state-coupling.json — 28 top-level fields, full forensic trace of 8 confirmed instances across 4 bug classes (Class 1a x5+, Class 1b x1, Class 2 x1, Class 3 x1), 18-coupling cross-agent state-coupling audit (5 safe / 11 covered / 2 latent risks), measurement plan with baseline + post-fix targets + per-mechanism disprove conditions, sequencing argument confirming operator's sequential lean.

findings.description: Pre-flight directive discovery wired in at the very top of dispatcher selection. This directive (DIRECTIVE-20260502-001) was the first directive picked up by the new pre-flight step (added 2026-05-02 per commit 46e2c10). Discovery worked correctly: 9 directives in the queue, 1 with status:'pending' (this one), 8 legacy with status:'open' filtered out as expected. Pre-flight selected the right directive.
findings.evidence: ls monitor/tinker/operator-directives/ shows 9 .json files; node-script in dispatcher correctly identified DIRECTIVE-20260502-001 as the only pending one, priority:'high', target_mode:'Mode 4 — Proposals & Self-Fixes'.

recommendations.description: Operator reviews PROP-014. Authorize sequential rollout (recommended) or parallel rollout (faster relief, less diagnostic). Decide whether to extend Mechanism 1b to all analyst modes immediately or stage to Mode 5 only. Decide whether to invest in shared reference doc + verifier script (recommended) or inline disciplines per agent prompt (faster but more duplication).

Next Mode 3 run: re-evaluate the three deferred findings from 2026-05-01T09-45 (PROP-013 stale verification_pattern, schedule-table divergence, decider report schema drift). PROP-014 supersedes the first if implemented; the others persist independently.
